data.body: AC amendment: Add acceptance criterion for sentinel write failure handling. When the ticket CLI returns non-zero for the sentinel comment write, sprint-manual-drain.sh MUST exit non-zero with a diagnostic message rather than silently dropping the sentinel. Add test: test_drain_sentinel_write_failure_exits_nonzero — Given: DSO_MANUAL_INPUT=done, verification passes, but ticket CLI is mocked to fail on comment write. Then: script exits non-zero and outputs 'ERROR: failed to write sentinel comment for story <id>'.
